teams.name: Seattle Mariners
headlines: Mariners (9-13) looking to bounce back from slow start to season
Cal Raleigh keeping the faith despite team's early struggles
Josh Naylor hits first walk-off single to cap win over Athletics
Bryce Miller making rehab start at Triple-A Tacoma
Randy Johnson Number Retirement Ceremony scheduled for May 2

details.notes: Team split opening series with Cleveland Guardians. Emerson Hancock had career-high 9 strikeouts in series. Colt Emerson (top prospect) hit HR and stole 2 bases in Triple-A but also suffered foot injury (X-rays negative).

last_game.highlights: Josh Naylor walk-off single, Cal Raleigh solo home run (5th of season)

teams.name: Seattle Seahawks
headlines: Seahawks are defending Super Bowl champions (first title in over a decade)
Seahawks surprisingly spurn trade frenzy to make No. 32 pick in 2026 Draft
Team selected running back to replace Kenneth Walker III who departed for Kansas City Chiefs
Sam Darnold married Katie Hoofnagle on April 3, 2026
Offseason workout program began April 20

details.draft_notes: Selected RB in first round to fill need after Kenneth Walker III left in free agency. Zach Charbonnet recovering from torn ACL.

last_game.notes: First Super Bowl win in over a decade

next_game.notes: Regular season schedule to be announced. Training camp and preseason upcoming.

teams.name: Seattle Kraken
headlines: Kraken did not make the 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs
Team spent over 100 days holding a playoff position this season
Younger players gained valuable experience during stretch run
Prospect Villeneuve (2024 2nd-rounder) performing well in OHL playoffs with Windsor Spitfires
Early trade candidates emerging after missing playoffs

details.season_summary: Held playoff spot for 100+ days but fell short in final stretch
details.prospect_updates: Villeneuve has 20 penalty minutes in first two rounds of OHL playoffs, improved discipline from last season (73 PIM vs 120 previous season)

last_game.notes: Missed playoffs after stretch run proved team's undoing

next_game.notes: Offseason ahead with potential trades being discussed

teams.name: Seattle Sounders
headlines: Sounders defeated Tigres UANL 3-1 in Concacaf Champions Cup Quarterfinals (April 15)
Team advances in Champions Cup after strong performance vs Liga MX side
Record currently 5-1-1, 4th place in Western Conference
Six-week break coming in May-June for 2026 FIFA World Cup
Lumen Field undergoing World Cup preparations (grass pitch installation)

details.notes: Playing home matches while Lumen Field undergoes World Cup preparations. Five consecutive away matches from February to April due to stadium work.

last_game.notes: Part of home stand at alternate venue during Lumen Field renovations
